items.caption: A person wearing a white t-shirt with black text printed on it. the text reads "recognise synchronise harmonise visualise atomise crystallise what's inside? become the one you know you are." the t-shirt is a slim fit style, and the person is standing against a plain background. the text appears to be a phrase or a slogan, possibly related to the artist goldfrapp and the concept of self-awareness or self-discovery. the style of the image is a product display, likely for online retail or promotional purposes.
